originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing Prioritized Experience Replay and V-Trace in PufferLib
summary: Implemented prioritized experience replay with importance sampling and V-trace off-policy correction in PufferLib. Debugged V-trace across environments, finding it worked on Breakout but failed on others like snake. Tested prioritized replay on neural MMO with improved learning curves.
